class.name: GFValidationReportDictionary
class.description: GFValidationReportDictionary: 通用校验报告字典辅助。 提供字典报告的追加、归一化、统计和严重级别提升工具，便于字典式报告 接入 `GFValidationIssue` / `GFValidationReport` 使用的标准字段。

member.name: issue_to_dict
member.signature: static func issue_to_dict(issue: Variant, include_empty_fields: bool = false) -> Dictionary:
member.description: 将任意问题转换为字典。

tags.tag: include_empty_fields: 为 true 时包含空的可选字段。
issue: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue or Dictionary issue payload.

member.name: report_from_dict
member.description: 将报告字典转换为 GFValidationReport。

member.name: append_issue
member.signature: static func append_issue( report: Dictionary, severity: Variant, kind: StringName, message: String, fields: Dictionary = {} ) -> Dictionary:

tags.tag: severity: 严重级别，可传入 Severity、int 或字符串。
fields: 附加字段，例如 key、path、row_key、metadata。
report: Dictionary report payload mutated in place.
severity: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue.Severity, int, String, or StringName.

member.name: append_source_issue
member.signature: static func append_source_issue( report: Dictionary, severity: Variant, kind: StringName, message: String, source_span: Variant, fields: Dictionary = {} ) -> Dictionary:
member.description: 向字典报告追加带源码定位的问题。

tags.tag: severity: 严重级别，可传入 Severity、int 或字符串。
fields: 附加字段，例如 key、path、row_key、metadata。
report: Dictionary report payload mutated in place.
severity: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue.Severity, int, String, or StringName.
source_span: Variant accepting GFSourceSpan or Dictionary span payload.

member.name: finalize_report
member.signature: static func finalize_report( report: Dictionary, subject: String = "", options: Dictionary = {} ) -> Dictionary:
member.description: 重新计算字典报告的统计字段。

tags.tag: subject: 摘要主题；为空时使用 report.subject 或 Validation report。
report: Dictionary report payload mutated in place.

member.name: make_summary
member.signature: static func make_summary(subject: String, error_count: int, warning_count: int) -> String:

member.name: get_next_action
member.signature: static func get_next_action( report: Dictionary, action_map: Dictionary = {}, fallback_action: String = "Review the first reported issue.", no_action: String = "No action required.", options: Dictionary = {} ) -> String:

tags.tag: action_map: 按问题类别映射的建议文本。
fallback_action: 存在问题但未命中映射时返回的建议。
no_action: 没有问题时返回的建议。
options: 严重级别计算选项。
action_map: Dictionary keyed by issue kind with action text values.

member.name: has_error_issues
member.signature: static func has_error_issues(report: Dictionary, options: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
member.description: 检查报告是否包含错误。

tags.tag: options: 严重级别计算选项。

member.name: make_issue_fingerprint
member.signature: static func make_issue_fingerprint(issue: Variant, fields: PackedStringArray = PackedStringArray()) -> String:
member.description: 生成稳定的问题指纹，用于项目工具的忽略项、基线和 CI 差异比较。

tags.tag: issue: GFValidationIssue 或兼容问题字典。
fields: 参与指纹计算的字段；为空时使用 severity、kind、path、source_path、key 和 message。
问题指纹；输入无效时返回空字符串。
issue: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue or Dictionary issue payload.

member.name: filter_issues
member.signature: static func filter_issues(report: Dictionary, options: Dictionary = {}) -> Dictionary:
member.description: 返回应用忽略项和基线后的报告副本。

tags.tag: report: 输入报告字典，不会被修改。
options: 可选过滤设置，支持 ignored_kinds、ignored_paths、ignored_path_patterns、ignored_keys、ignored_fingerprints、baseline_fingerprints、baseline_issues、fingerprint_fields、include_filter_summary。
过滤并重新 finalize 的报告副本。

member.name: promote_warnings
member.signature: static func promote_warnings(report: Dictionary, kinds: PackedStringArray = PackedStringArray()) -> Dictionary:
member.description: 将报告中的警告提升为错误。

tags.tag: kinds: 为空时提升全部警告；否则只提升匹配类别。
report: Dictionary report payload mutated in place.
return: Dictionary report payload mutated in place.
